sections.title: Test Infrastructure
sections.content:
**Gap:** No test runner (jest/vitest/playwright) exists in `devDependencies`. TypeScript test won't even resolve `@types/jest` or `vitest`.

**Setup needed before any test can run:**
- Either `vitest` (lighter for Next.js) or `jest` with `@swc/jest` or `ts-jest`
- A `vitest.config.ts` or `jest.config.ts`
- Mock for Prisma (`prisma.mock.ts` or `vitest-mock-extended`)
- Mock for `next/navigation` and `next/server` (`NextRequest` constructor)

---

sections.title: Gap 1: Auth Utilities (`src/lib/auth.ts`) — CRITICAL
Gap 2: WhatsApp Notification (`src/utils/waNotification.ts`) — HIGH
Gap 3: PDF Export (`src/utils/pdfExport.ts`) — MEDIUM
Gap 4: Auth API Routes — HIGH (Security Critical)
Key route-level test skeletons:
Gap 5: Missing Integration Tests — HIGH
sections.content:
**Key cross-entity flows:**

| Flow | Routes Involved | Why Critical |
|---|---|---|
| Teacher submits IZIN → Admin approves → Student sees status | `POST teacher/attendance` → `POST admin/approval` → `GET student/permit` | Core workflow |
| Student submits permit → appears in teacher approval list | `POST student/permit` → `GET teacher/approval` | 2-role handoff |
| Daily recap for a class → correct status counts | `POST admin/attendance` → `GET recap/daily` | Report accuracy |
| Change password → new password works, old fails | `PUT auth/password` → `POST auth/login` | Account security |
| Delete student with existing kehadiran/izin records | cascade behavior | Data integrity |
| Concurrent attendance submission for same student+date | `POST teacher/attendance` for same `siswaId_tanggal` | Race condition |

---

sections.title: Priority Roadmap
sections.content:
| Priority | What | Why |
|---|---|---|
| **P0** | Add vitest + prisma mock to devDependencies | Nothing runs without this |
| **P1** | `auth.ts` unit tests | Core auth — wrong decrypt = any user can impersonate any role |
| **P1** | `login/route.ts` tests | Rate limiter is untested, in-memory, and shared mutable |
| **P2** | `admin/attendance` + `teacher/attendance` routes | Core attendance flow, WhatsApp integration |
| **P2** | `admin/approval` + `teacher/approval` routes | Multi-role approval chain |
| **P2** | `admin/classes` + `admin/student` + `admin/teacher` routes | CRUD with duplicate detection |
| **P3** | `waNotification.ts` + `pdfExport.ts` | Utility-only, error branches don't cause data loss |
| **P3** | Integration test for submit→approve→recap flow | Covers the highest-value business transaction |
| **P4** | `stats/route.ts` + recap routes | Pure aggregation queries, low mutation risk |
| **P4** | `logout`, `session`, `name`, `username` | Simple cookie ops |

---

**Bottom line:** ~2,300 lines of production code, 0 tests. Auth token handling and the login rate limiter are the highest-urgency gaps — a wrong `decryptSession` or an untested rate-limit bypass affects every user. Recommend adding vitest + a prisma mock helper first, then covering `auth.ts` and `login/route.ts` before anything else.

rawOutputPreview:
**No test files, no test config, no testing deps in package.json.** The entire codebase has zero tests. Here's the full gap analysis.

---

## Test Infrastructure

**Gap:** No test runner (jest/vitest/playwright) exists in `devDependencies`. TypeScript test won't even resolve `@types/jest` or `vitest`.

**Setup needed before any test can run:**
- Either `vitest` (lighter for Next.js) or `jest` with `@swc/jest` or `ts-jest`
- A `vitest.config.ts` or `jest.config.ts`
- Mock for Prisma (`prisma.mock.ts` or `vitest-mock-extended`)
- Mock for `next/navigation` and `next/server` (`NextRequest` constructor)

---

## Gap 1: Auth Utilities (`src/lib/auth.ts`) — CRITICAL

**Untested functions:**
| Function | Risk |
|---|---|
| `hashPassword()` | bcrypt wrapping — trivial but untested |
| `verifyPassword()` | Returns wrong boolean = login bypass |
| `encryptSession()` | Uses static IV (already a security smell), no test |
| `decryptSession()` | Core auth gate — tampered tokens, malformed input |
| `getSession()` | Cookie missing/invalid |
| `isAdmin()`/`isSiswa()` | Role delegation logic |

**Edge cases not covered:**
- Token without `.` separator → `decryptSession` returns null
- Role prefix mismatch (e.g. `ADMIN.encryptedData` where decrypted says `role: "GURU"`) → line 55 catches this but untested
- Garbage hex data → `createDecipheriv.final()` throws, caught by `catch` returning null
- Empty cookie value → null early return
- Token with extra parts (`A.B.C`) → only reads parts[0] and parts[1], ignores rest — should test

  it('returns null for token without dot separator', () => {
    expect(decryptSession('invalidtoken')).toBeNull();
  });

  it('returns null for tampered hex payload', () => {
    expect(decryptSession('ADMIN.garbagehexdata')).to
